body.description:
Second pass of the SQLite ? → psycopg2 %s sweep. Files missed by 0236d93a: goal_graph.py, persistent_relationships.py, pr_accretion.py, self_inspect.py, sleep_consolidation.py, replay.py, terminal.py, consolidation.py (dynamic IN clause); test files: test_goal_graph.py, test_graph_integrator.py, test_twm_leap_on_lever.py (assertion string updated to match %s). Fixed as incidental work during T-discord-uc-routing-verify.

**Affected files:** 10 production/test files
**Design rules:** no-sqlite
**Scope boundary:** placeholder syntax only
**Test plan:** 4479 tests pass (commit 5ffd2fb3)
body.done_summary: Fixed in 5ffd2fb3 alongside T-discord-uc-routing-verify. 10 files, all ? → %s in Postgres execute() calls.
